emails.subject: ETC Survey Action Planning
emails.body: ETC Survey Action Planning Hi all, Just a friendly reminder to forward me names of those you'd like to place on the ETC Action Teams if you haven't already done so. Also, please remember to specify whether you're placing someone on the Global team or the Corporate team. Attached are the meeting notes for your reference. Thanks, Kim Rizzi x3-3833
